emails.subject: FW: Crescendo
emails.body: FW: Crescendo I understand from Janet Place that this is not a Northern Border project but rather a North America project and that she is leaving you a voice mail regarding this. I assume that either you or Andy Edison will follow up. Thank you. JIm

emails.subject: RE: Crescendo
emails.body: RE: Crescendo Thanks. We will run with it.
